The Walk is a community of people following Jesus together — one honest step at a time.

Watch The Walk 4 God Podcast Support the Walk
Mile One — Who We Are

Strengthening Faith,
One Step at a Time.

The Walk exists to share the hope of Jesus Christ and encourage people to grow in their relationship with Him. Through our testimonies, gifts, and everyday walks with God, we want to remind people that no one has to follow Jesus alone.

We believe every testimony has the power to point someone to Christ. That's why we use our walks with God to encourage others in theirs. This isn't a replacement for your time with God, but a resource to strengthen your faith and continually point you back to His Word.

Whether you're searching for hope or have followed Jesus your whole life, you're welcome here. Let's keep walking together.

01

Vision

To share the Gospel and our stories of transformation through Christ.

02

Mission

To help the next generation grow in their walk with God through practical guidance and authentic discipleship.

03

Discipleship

To make faithful disciples of Jesus Christ by teaching God's word and equipping believers.

Mile Five — Give

Your giving keeps the podcast running, our gatherings free and open, and lets us reach more people who need a community to walk with. Every bit helps — thank you for walking with us.
